## Plan reference (required)

- **Sprint folder:** `.plan/sprint-NN-.../`
- **Task file:** `.plan/sprint-NN-.../XX-...-tasks.md`
- **Epic / task ID:** e.g. `A1`, `B2` (from the task file)

## Definition of Done

Per [`.plan/definition-of-done.md`](https://github.com/somralab/somra-media/blob/main/.plan/definition-of-done.md) §1:

- [ ] Acceptance criteria verified
- [ ] Unit tests (integration where relevant); coverage thresholds met
- [ ] `make lint` clean
- [ ] i18n: en-US + tr-TR keys (if user-facing)
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Code review approval
